headline: Morgan Stanley Lifts Price Target on Edison International (EIX). Here is Why
summary: With an annual dividend yield of 4.64%, Edison International (NYSE:EIX) is included among the 12 Best NYSE Stocks to Buy for Dividends. Edison International (NYSE:EIX) is one of the largest electric utility holding companies in America, focused on providing clean and reliable energy and energy services through its independent companies.
